title: NORM RESNICK JOINS SNC MANAGEMENT TEAM AS GENERAL COUNSEL
summary: Sitnasuak Native Corporation (SNC) is pleased to welcome Mr. Norm Resnick to the SNC management team as General Counsel. Mr. Resnick started this position on July 24, 2018, and is based in our Anchorage, Alaska office. As general counsel, he will be the chief legal officer for SNC and our family of...
